title: Corn Crusted Medley Bake
description: A tasty and easy-to-make medley bake with a crunchy corn crust topping. Serve as a side dish or add your favorite protein for a complete meal.

ingredients.name: 1 cup medley
ingredients.notes: mix of bell peppers and onions

instructions: In a bowl, mix together cornmeal and crust.
In a separate pan, sauté medley until tender.
Add cooked medley to the cornmeal mixture and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with additional crust if desired.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until crust is golden brown.
